channel.title: Aidan Steele's blog (usually about AWS)
channel.description: Here's my seventh or eighth attempt at a blog. It's mostly going to be my experimentation with using AWS (Amazon Web Services, not Aidan William Steele)

item.title: new post test rss
item.description:
tl;dr: You can now pass an IAM role to every EC2 instance in your account + region.

item.title: Surprising behaviour in AWS web console session duration
